# HeartPulse

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="HeartPulse icon">

type="button" class="dioxus-icons-widget-copy" data-di-copy="true" aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::HeartPulse;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        HeartPulse { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
heartbeat, pulse, health, medical, blood pressure, cardiac, systole, diastole

## Categories
medical

## Source
